name: vue-vapor-effectful-list-bench
description: effectful-list bench fixture for Vue Vapor (3.6 vapor mode: <script setup vapor> SFCs, keyed v-for over a shallowRef row array + onMounted/onUnmounted/watchPostEffect/function-ref lifecycle counters) - exposes window.__mount/__op* + __fx for the Playwright harness; ops return nextTick() (Vue has no public sync flush).
